name: File3dm
summary: Represents a 3dm file, which is stored using the OpenNURBS file standard. The 3dm format is the main Rhinoceros storage format.Visit http://www.opennurbs.com/ for more details.

constructors.name: File3dm
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of a 3dm file.

methods.name: Audit
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Polish and Audit functionality no longer exist.")] public int Audit(bool attemptRepair, out int repairCount, out string errors, out int[] warnings)
methods.summary: This function is only kept for forward assembly compatibility.

params.name: attemptRepair
params.doc: Ignored.

params.name: repairCount
params.doc: Is set to 0.

params.name: errors
params.doc: Contains no meaningful error.

params.name: warnings
params.doc: Is set to null.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: For derived class implementers. This method is called with argument true when class user calls Dispose(), while with argument false when the Garbage Collector invokes the finalizer, or Finalize() method.You must reclaim all used unmanaged resources in both cases, and can use this chance to call Dispose on disposable fields if the argument is true.Also, you must call the base virtual method within your overriding method.

params.name: disposing
params.doc: true if the call comes from the Dispose() method; false if it comes from the Garbage Collector finalizer.

methods.name: Dump
methods.summary: Prepares a text dump of the entire model.

methods.name: DumpSummary
methods.summary: Prepares a text dump of model properties and settings.

methods.name: DumpToTextLog
methods.summary: Prepares a text dump of the entire model.

params.name: log
params.doc: [Missing <param name="log"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.FileIO.File3dm.DumpToTextLog(Rhino.FileIO.TextLog)"]

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: FromByteArray
methods.summary: Read a 3dm file from a byte array

params.name: bytes
params.doc: [Missing <param name="bytes"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.FileIO.File3dm.FromByteArray(System.Byte[])"]

returns.doc: New File3dm on success, null on error.

methods.name: GetPreviewImage
methods.summary: Preview image used for file explorer

methods.name: IsValid(String)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("IsValid now returns always true.")] public bool IsValid(out string errors)
methods.summary: The File3dm object is kept consistent during its creation. Therefore, this function now returns only true.

params.name: errors
params.doc: No errors are found.

methods.name: IsValid(TextLog)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("IsValid now returns always true.")] public bool IsValid(TextLog errors)
methods.summary: The File3dm object is kept consistent during its creation. Therefore, this function now returns only true.

params.name: errors
params.doc: No errors are found.

methods.name: Polish
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Polish and Audit functionality no longer exist.")] public void Polish()
methods.summary: This function is only kept for forward assembly compatibility.

methods.name: Read(String)
methods.summary: Reads a 3dm file from a specified location.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file to read.

returns.doc: new File3dm on success, null on error.

methods.name: Read(String, File3dm.TableTypeFilter, File3dm.ObjectTypeFilter)
methods.signature: public static File3dm Read(string path, File3dm.TableTypeFilter tableTypeFilterFilter, File3dm.ObjectTypeFilter objectTypeFilter)
methods.summary: Reads a 3dm file from a specified location.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file to read.

params.name: tableTypeFilterFilter
params.doc: If tableTypeFilterFilter is None, then everything in the archive is read. Otherwise tableTypeFilterFilter identifies what tables should be read.

params.name: objectTypeFilter
params.doc: If objectTypeFilter is not None, then is a filter made by bitwise or-ing values to select which types of objects will be read from the model object table.

returns.doc: new File3dm on success, null on error.

methods.name: ReadApplicationData
methods.signature: public static void ReadApplicationData(string path, out string applicationName, out string applicationUrl, out string applicationDetails)
methods.summary: Reads only the application information from an existing 3dm file.

params.name: path
params.doc: A location on disk or network.

params.name: applicationName
params.doc: The application name. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

params.name: applicationUrl
params.doc: The application URL. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

params.name: applicationDetails
params.doc: The application details. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

methods.name: ReadArchiveVersion
methods.summary: Reads only the archive 3dm version from an existing 3dm file.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file from which to read the archive version.

throws.when: If path does not exist, is null or cannot be accessed because of permissions.

methods.name: ReadDimensionStyles
methods.summary: Read the dimension styles table out of a 3dm file.

params.name: path
params.doc: The location of the file.

returns.doc: Array of dimension styles on success (empty array if file does not contain dimension styles) null on error

throws.when: If the provided path is null, does not exist or cannot be accessed.

methods.name: ReadNotes
methods.summary: Reads only the notes from an existing 3dm file.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file from which to read the notes.

throws.when: If path does not exist, is null or cannot be accessed because of permissions.

methods.name: ReadPreviewImage
methods.summary: Attempts to read the preview image out of a 3dm file.

params.name: path
params.doc: The location of the file.

returns.doc: A bitmap, or null on failure.

throws.when: If the provided path is null, does not exist or cannot be accessed.

methods.name: ReadRevisionHistory
methods.signature: public static bool ReadRevisionHistory(string path, out string createdBy, out string lastEditedBy, out int revision, out DateTime createdOn, out DateTime lastEditedOn)
methods.summary: Quickly check a file for it's revision information. This function does not read the entire file, just what it needs to get revision information out

params.name: path
params.doc: path to the 3dm file

params.name: createdBy
params.doc: original author of the file

params.name: lastEditedBy
params.doc: last person to edit the file

params.name: revision
params.doc: which revision this file is at

params.name: createdOn
params.doc: date file was created (DateTime.MinValue if not set in file)

params.name: lastEditedOn
params.doc: date file was last edited (DateTime.MinValue if not set in file)

methods.name: ReadWithLog(String, String)
methods.signature: public static File3dm ReadWithLog(string path, out string errorLog)
methods.summary: Read a 3dm file from a specified location and log any archive reading errors.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file to read.

params.name: errorLog
params.doc: Any archive reading errors are logged here.

returns.doc: New File3dm on success, null on error.

methods.name: ReadWithLog(String, File3dm.TableTypeFilter, File3dm.ObjectTypeFilter, String)
methods.signature: public static File3dm ReadWithLog(string path, File3dm.TableTypeFilter tableTypeFilterFilter, File3dm.ObjectTypeFilter objectTypeFilter, out string errorLog)
methods.summary: Reads a 3dm file from a specified location.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file to read.

params.name: tableTypeFilterFilter
params.doc: If tableTypeFilterFilter is None, then everything in the archive is read. Otherwise tableTypeFilterFilter identifies what tables should be read.

params.name: objectTypeFilter
params.doc: If objectTypeFilter is not None, then is a filter made by bitwise or-ing values to select which types of objects will be read from the model object table.

params.name: errorLog
params.doc: Any archive reading errors are logged here.

returns.doc: new File3dm on success, null on error.

methods.name: SetPreviewImage
methods.summary: Preview image used for file explorer

params.name: image
params.doc: [Missing <param name="image"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.FileIO.File3dm.SetPreviewImage(System.Drawing.Bitmap)"]

methods.name: ToByteArray()
methods.summary: Write to an in-memory byte[]

methods.name: ToByteArray(File3dmWriteOptions)
methods.summary: Write to an in-memory byte[]

params.name: options
params.doc: [Missing <param name="options"/> documentation for "M:Rhino.FileIO.File3dm.ToByteArray(Rhino.FileIO.File3dmWriteOptions)"]

methods.name: Write(String, File3dmWriteOptions)
methods.signature: public bool Write(string path, File3dmWriteOptions options)
methods.summary: Writes contents of this model to an openNURBS archive. If the model is not valid, then Write will refuse to write it.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file name to use for writing.

params.name: options
params.doc: An options instance, or null for default.

returns.doc: true if archive is written with no error. false if errors occur.

methods.name: Write(String, Int32)
methods.signature: public bool Write(string path, int version)
methods.summary: Writes contents of this model to an openNURBS archive. If the model is not valid, then Write will refuse to write it.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file name to use for writing.

params.name: version
params.doc: Version of the openNURBS archive to write. Must be [2; current version]. Rhino can read its current version, plus earlier file versions except 1. Use latest version when possible. Alternatively, 0 is a placeholder for the last valid version.

returns.doc: true if archive is written with no error. false if errors occur.

methods.name: WriteMultipleObjects
methods.signature: public static bool WriteMultipleObjects(string path, IEnumerable<GeometryBase> geometry)
methods.summary: Creates a simple 3dm file that contains a multiple geometric objects.

params.name: path
params.doc: Path to the 3dm file to create.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: The geometry to be saved in the archive's object table. This is typically some Curves, Surfaces, Breps, Meshs, or SubDs.

methods.name: WriteOneObject
methods.signature: public static bool WriteOneObject(string path, GeometryBase geometry)
methods.summary: Creates a simple 3dm file that contains a single geometric object.

params.name: path
params.doc: Path to the 3dm file to create.

params.name: geometry
params.doc: The geometry to be saved in the archive's object table. This is typically a Curve, Surface, Brep, Mesh, or SubD.

methods.name: WriteWithLog(String, File3dmWriteOptions, String)
methods.signature: public bool WriteWithLog(string path, File3dmWriteOptions options, out string errorLog)
methods.summary: Writes contents of this model to an openNURBS archive. If the model is not valid, then Write will refuse to write it.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file name to use for writing.

params.name: options
params.doc: An options instance, or null for default.

params.name: errorLog
params.doc: This argument will be filled by out reference.

returns.doc: true if archive is written with no error. false if errors occur.

methods.name: WriteWithLog(String, Int32, String)
methods.signature: public bool WriteWithLog(string path, int version, out string errorLog)
methods.summary: Writes contents of this model to an openNURBS archive. If the model is not valid, then Write will refuse to write it.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file name to use for writing.

params.name: version
params.doc: Version of the openNURBS archive to write. Must be [2; current version]. Rhino can read its current version, plus earlier file versions except 1. Use latest version when possible. Alternatively, 0 is a placeholder for the last valid version.

params.name: errorLog
params.doc: This argument will be filled by out reference.

returns.doc: true if archive is written with no error. false if errors occur.

properties.name: AllDimStyles
properties.summary: Dimension Styles in this file.

properties.name: AllGroups
properties.summary: Groups in this file.

properties.name: AllHatchPatterns
properties.summary: Hatch patterns in this file.

properties.name: AllInstanceDefinitions
properties.summary: Instance definitions in this file

properties.name: AllLayers
properties.summary: Layers in this file.

properties.name: AllLinetypes
properties.summary: Linetypes in this file.

properties.name: AllMaterials
properties.summary: Materials in this file.

properties.name: AllNamedConstructionPlanes
properties.summary: Named construction planes in this file.

properties.name: AllNamedViews
properties.summary: Named views in this file.

properties.name: AllViews
properties.summary: Views that represent the RhinoViews which are displayed when Rhino loads this file.

properties.name: ApplicationDetails
properties.summary: Gets or sets details for the application that wrote this file.

properties.name: ApplicationName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the application that wrote this file.

properties.name: ApplicationUrl
properties.summary: Gets or sets a URL for the application that wrote this file.

properties.name: ArchiveVersion
properties.summary: Gets the 3dm file archive version.

properties.name: Created
properties.summary: Get the DateTime that this file was originally created. If the value is not set in the 3dm file, then DateTime.MinValue is returned

properties.name: CreatedBy
properties.summary: Gets a string that names the user who created the file.

properties.name: DimStyles
properties.summary: Dimension Styles in this file.

properties.name: HatchPatterns
properties.summary: Hatch patterns in this file

properties.name: InstanceDefinitions
properties.summary: Instance definitions in this file.

properties.name: LastEdited
properties.summary: Get the DateTime that this file was last edited. If the value is not set in the 3dm file, then DateTime.MinValue is returned

properties.name: LastEditedBy
properties.summary: Gets a string that names the user who last edited the file.

properties.name: Layers
properties.summary: Layers in this file.

properties.name: Linetypes
properties.summary: Linetypes in this file.

properties.name: Manifest
properties.summary: Retrieves the manifest with all object descriptions in this file.

properties.name: Materials
properties.summary: Materials in this file.

properties.name: NamedConstructionPlanes
properties.summary: Named construction planes in this file.

properties.name: NamedViews
properties.summary: Named views in this file.

properties.name: Notes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the model notes.

properties.name: Objects
properties.summary: Gets access to the File3dmObjectTable class associated with this file, which contains all objects.

properties.name: PlugInData
properties.summary: Custom plug-in data in this file. This data is not attached to any geometry or attributes

properties.name: Revision
properties.summary: Gets or sets the revision number.

properties.name: Settings
properties.summary: Settings include tolerance, and unit system, and defaults used for creating views and objects.

properties.name: StartSectionComments
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start section comments, which are the comments with which the 3dm file begins.

properties.name: Strings
properties.summary: Document user strings in this file

properties.name: Views
properties.summary: Views that represent the RhinoViews which are displayed when Rhino loads this file.
